Analyze this projects source code locally by running some linters and analyzers.

== Overview

This script analyzes this projects source code by running some linters and
analyzers. The script is intended to run on your local machine.

=== Script Arguments

* _$1_ (string): Use `--save-report` to run in pipelines. When omitting this option a webserver starts at link:http://localhost:8080[localhost:8080].

=== Script Example

[source, bash]

----
./analyze.sh
----

== Index

* <<_log_error,LOG_ERROR>>
* <<_log_info,LOG_INFO>>
* <<_log_header,LOG_HEADER>>

=== LOG_ERROR

Log message with log level = ERROR.

==== Arguments

* *...* (String): The line to print.

=== LOG_INFO

Log message with log level = INFO.

==== Arguments

* *...* (String): The line to print.

=== LOG_HEADER

Print log output in a header-style.

==== Arguments

* *...* (String): The line to print.
